memoryArtifacts.headline: Biographical Wikipedia Article
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir William Norreys (c. 1441 – before 10 January 1507)[1] was a famous Lancastrian soldier, and later an Esquire of the Body to King Edward IV.

Probably born at Yattendon Castle, William was the elde …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Norreys於1441年出生在英國波克夏亞頓登時，他的父親Sir John Norreys42歲，母親Lady Alice Merbrooke36歲。他於1457年與Joan de Vere在英國英格蘭波克夏布雷結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1507年1月4日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾明日香享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Norreys于1441年出生在英国波克夏亞頓登时，他的父亲Sir John Norreys42岁，母亲Lady Alice Merbrooke36岁。他于1457年与Joan de Vere在英国英格兰波克夏布雷结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1507年1月4日在英国英格兰奧可福爾明日香享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Norreys was born in 1441, in Yattendon, Berkshire, England, his father, Sir John Norreys, was 42 and his mother, Lady Alice Merbrooke, was 36. He married Joan de Vere in 1457, in Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 January 1507, in Langley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Norreys est né en 1441, à Yattendon, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Norreys, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Merbrooke, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Vere en 1457, à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1507, à Langley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Norreys 1441 in Yattendon, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Norreys 42 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Merbrooke 36. Er hat 1457 in Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Januar 1507 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Langley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bray, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Norreys è nato il nel 1441 nel Yattendon, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Norreys, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Merbrooke, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Vere nel 1457, nel Bray, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 gennaio 1507, nel Langley, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Bray, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Norreysが1441年にイギリスバークシュアイアヤッテンドンで生まれた時，父Sir John Norreysは42歳，母Lady Alice Merbrookeは36歳であった。1457年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアブレイでJoan de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1507年1月4日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアラングリーで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Norreys(이)가 1441년 영국 버크실르 야텐던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Norreys(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Merbrooke(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 브라이에서 Joan de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 1월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 랭글리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 브라이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Norreys nasceu em 1441, em Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Norreys, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Merbrooke, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Vere em 1457, em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1507, em Langley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Norreys родился в 1441 г. в местности яттендон, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Norreys было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Merbrooke, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Vere в 1457 г. в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 января 1507 г. в местности лангли, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Norreys nació en 1441, en Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Norreys, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Merbrooke, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Joan de Vere en 1457, en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de enero de 1507, en Langley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
